findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_starter" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Fetch the full HTML body, CSS, sampleData, and pageOptions for one starter template by slug. Use this when you need to understand the exact shape of `data` the …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
